verdict_reasoning: LYN is a Src-family tyrosine kinase canonically anchored to the inner leaflet of the PM via N-terminal myristoylation/palmitoylation, making it cytoplasmic-facing at baseline. However, ecto-LYN/surface display of Src-family kinases has been reported on tumor cells and during cell-state changes, and LYN translocates with signaling complexes. Given the inner-leaflet anchoring is the dominant biology but cancer/stress-induced ecto-display is plausible for SFKs, contextual via cell-state-induced is the safer call than no.
